channel.title: Comments for page "Stars Over Misty Veil"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Stars Over Misty Veil"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This was like an unexpected birthday present - a follow-up to one of my all-time favourite SCP articles. I liked this on first read, but it benefited from a second. There is a hushed, anticipatory feeling to it which is delightful - complementary to the magical realism of the SCP, but using the magazine style to give it a distinct identity. The atmosphere it generates feels brilliantly tangible - a real moment between people, arising from the unreal.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
shouldn't that attachment be this magazine article

An attempt at versimilitude by having the attachment actually being something, combined with shoe-horning in a link to the original article. I get the confusion, though. I might mess with that later today.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is a pitch perfect pastiche of magazine writing and it does form a nice coda to one of the most beautifully bittersweet articles on the site. I am a little confused by the link to the SCP article in the email though, shouldn't that attachment be this magazine article?
